instruction: The at symbol icon's stroke is too thick (currently 4). Reset stroke-width to 1.5.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/at-symbol.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M16.5 12a4.5 4.5 0 1 1-9 0 4.5 4.5 0 0 1 9 0Zm0 0c0 1.657 1.007 3 2.25 3S21 13.657 21 12a9 9 0 1 0-2.636 6.364M16.5 12V8.25"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
